Overview Documentation¶

Purpose¶

This section contains foundational RTOS theory that supports all daily lessons.

Recommended Reading Order¶

  1. RTOS basics and terminology

  2. Scheduling and determinism

  3. Synchronization primitives

  4. Interrupt model and deferred processing

  5. Memory policy and timing analysis

Authoring Style¶

  • Use short conceptual definitions first.

  • Follow with one practical embedded example.

  • End each page with a quick checklist.

Planned Pages¶

  • rtos_basics.rst

  • scheduling.rst

  • synchronization.rst

  • interrupts.rst

  • memory_management.rst

  • timing_analysis.rst

Learn Embedded RTOS in 20 Days
